name: Franklin YMCA
description: Franklin YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Franklin, PA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Hasson Heights
description: Come play pickleball at Hasson Heights in Oil City, PA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Hughes Park
description: Hughes Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Emlenton, PA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Morrison Park
description: Come play pickleball at Morrison Park in Seneca, PA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Oil City YMCA
description: Oil City YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Oil City, PA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Rose Schneider YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Rose Schneider YMCA in Cranberry Township, PA! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
